[Rule: readable_code/02_naming.md | File: main.py]
**Checked rule:** Naming style (`readable_code/02_naming.md`)

---

**Violations found in `main.py`:**

| Line | Identifier | Rule Violated |
|------|------------|---------------|
| 3 | `bad_function` | Placeholder name — explicitly listed as always-flag (`bad_function`) |
| 3 | `x` | Single-letter parameter name — not a loop index (`i`, `j`, `k`) |
| 3 | `y` | Single-letter parameter name — not a loop index (`i`, `j`, `k`) |

**Note:** `'tmp'` on line 5 is a string literal, not a code identifier, so it is not flagged under the naming rule.

[Action Required]
Fix the violations above.
If any violation is a false positive, add a description to .complete-validator/suppressions.md.
